nodes.name: 塞拉利昂
nodes.summary: 塞拉利昂是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联88种鸟类，包括Blue quail、Ahanta spurfowl、Yellow-billed turaco等88种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous fishing owl
nodes.summary: Rufous fishing owl（Rufous fishing owl，学名 Scotopelia ussheri），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, and Sierra Leone, where it occurs as a highly localised resident along shady river banks

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Consequently, it was downlisted to vulnerable in 2011. That being said, this species remains one of the rarest and least known owls species in the world and populations remain fragmented and continue to decline due to habitat loss
